title: Yui Lilith Soul Gestalt Rei and Eva 01s Souls
display_title: Yui Lilith Soul Gestalt Rei and Eva 01s Souls
wikitext:
[]: Yui-Lilith Soul Gestalt, 'Rei'; and Eva-01's Souls             Quote Post by anonymaus » Fri Sep 29, 2017 4:11 am https://i.imgur.com/5C9mUM2.jpg I finally collected thoughts I've been having for a while now about Rei and the souls inside EVA-01 and EVA-00. Here's how it looks to me. Rei is Yui + Lilith (mostly Lilith.) EVA-01 is Yui + Lilith (mostly Yui.) Lilith and Yui no longer have distinct souls. They were irreparably mixed together during Yui's contact experiment with Lilith's body. Mixtures of these souls exist in various ratios within Rei 1 (within EVA-00,) Rei 2, and EVA-01. It also contains a small theory about the third core of EVA-01 and why Eva-01 was able to initiate near-third impact all by itself in Rebuild.

[]: Re: Yui-Lilith Soul Gestalt, 'Rei'; and Eva-01's Souls             Quote Post by airman4 » Sun Dec 10, 2017 5:22 pm Nice one I mostly didnt knew Lilith and Adam was combined inside eva 01 in rebuild, that's insane I thought most evas had souls of their pilot's mother (like Asuka's mom is inside eva 02 and so on for toji etc ) If it's mostly eva 01 only why bother having other pilots who lost their mother as well ?

[]: Re: Yui-Lilith Soul Gestalt, 'Rei'; and Eva-01's Souls             Quote Post by anonymaus » Mon Dec 11, 2017 3:50 pm airman4 wrote: Nice one I mostly didnt knew Lilith and Adam was combined inside eva 01 in rebuild, that's insane I thought most evas had souls of their pilot's mother (like Asuka's mom is inside eva 02 and so on for toji etc ) If it's mostly eva 01 only why bother having other pilots who lost their mother as well ?

[]: Re: Yui-Lilith Soul Gestalt, 'Rei'; and Eva-01's Souls             Quote Post by anti_pope » Tue Dec 12, 2017 9:58 am airman4 wrote: Nice one I mostly didnt knew Lilith and Adam was combined inside eva 01 in rebuild, that's insane I thought most evas had souls of their pilot's mother (like Asuka's mom is inside eva 02 and so on for toji etc ) If it's mostly eva 01 only why bother having other pilots who lost their mother as well ?

[]: Re: Yui-Lilith Soul Gestalt, 'Rei'; and Eva-01's Souls             Quote Post by mys_721tx » Thu Jan 04, 2018 1:52 am One issue with the theory is that during the battle against Bardiel, Unit 01 is controlled by the dummy system . Even though a clone of Rei is needed for the dummy plug, we learned from Ritsuko that all non-prime clones are soulless. Although there is the possibility that there is yet another piece of Lilith's soul for the dummy system, it might be farfetched to say that Unit 01 awoken because the resident soul recalled how Rei I died. In episode 19, Unit 01 rejected both the dummy system and Rei, it probably is safe to say that Yui was not entirely happy about what the dummy system and/or Gendo had done.

They were irreparably mixed together during Yui's contact experiment with Lilith's body. Mixtures of these souls exist in various ratios within Rei 1 (within EVA-00,) Rei 2, and EVA-01. It also contains a small theory about the third core of EVA-01 and why Eva-01 was able to initiate near-third impact all by itself in Rebuild.
